summary: Astro-based Monarchic website surface with React/Svelte/Tailwind/Three.js assets and static pages.

repository_dependencies.reason: The autonomy roadmap and platform blueprint in meta define this repository as the buyer-facing narrative surface and route its commercial milestone sequencing.
The platform blueprint pairs website with monarchic-webapp as the commercial client surfaces, with website carrying buyer-facing narrative while monarchic-webapp owns the commercial control plane.
